company.name: ALiice
company.description: Medical CRM and clinic management platform for aesthetics clinics

features.name: Patient Management
features.description: Store and manage all patient information including contact details, medical history, and treatment records
key_actions: Add new patient: Click + Add Patient button
Search patients: Use search bar at top
View patient: Click on patient name
Import patients: Use CSV import option

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Manage clinic calendar, book appointments, and track consultations
key_actions: Book appointment: Click on time slot in calendar
View details: Click on any appointment

features.name: Online Booking Page
features.description: Customizable landing page where patients can book appointments directly
key_actions: Get booking link: Click Copy Link button
Enable services: Toggle which services appear

features.name: Services Catalog
features.description: Define all treatments and services with pricing and duration
key_actions: Add service: Click Add Service button
Set price: Enter price in service form
Set duration: Enter duration in minutes

features.name: Deals Pipeline
features.description: Track patient journey from inquiry to treatment using CRM pipeline
key_actions: Move stages: Drag deal card to new stage
Add notes: Click on deal to add notes

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Handle invoicing, payments, and financial tracking

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Assign and track tasks for team members

features.name: Settings
features.description: Configure clinic preferences and system settings
key_actions: Working hours: Set in Doctor Scheduling
Blocked dates: Add holidays and time off

onboarding_steps.title: Add Your First Patient
onboarding_steps.instructions: Go to Patients in the sidebar, click + Add Patient, enter name, email, and phone, then click Save

onboarding_steps.title: Set Up Services
onboarding_steps.instructions: Go to Services, click Add Service, enter treatment name, duration, and price, then save

onboarding_steps.title: Create Booking Page
onboarding_steps.instructions: Go to CMS > Book Appointment, customize your page, then click Copy Link to get your booking URL

onboarding_steps.title: Schedule Appointment
onboarding_steps.instructions: Go to Calendar, click on a time slot, select patient and service, add notes, and save

onboarding_steps.title: Configure Settings
onboarding_steps.instructions: Go to Settings, set up working hours in Doctor Scheduling, configure calendar defaults

faqs.question: How do I add a patient?
faqs.answer: Go to Patients in the sidebar, click the + Add Patient button, fill in their details like name, email, and phone, then click Save.

faqs.question: How do I set up online booking?
faqs.answer: Go to CMS in the sidebar, then click Book Appointment. Customize your booking page using the editor, then click Copy Link to get your shareable booking URL.

faqs.question: How do I schedule an appointment?
faqs.answer: Go to Calendar, click on the time slot you want, select the patient and service, add any notes, and click Save. The patient will receive a confirmation email.

faqs.question: How do I add a service?
faqs.answer: Go to Services in the sidebar, click Add Service, enter the service name, duration in minutes, and price, then save.

faqs.question: How do I get my booking link?
faqs.answer: Go to CMS > Book Appointment. At the top of the page, you'll see a Copy Link button. Click it to copy your booking page URL.

faqs.question: Can patients book online?
faqs.answer: Yes! Set up your booking page in CMS > Book Appointment, then share your booking link on your website or social media.

faqs.question: How do I create an invoice?
faqs.answer: Go to Financials in the sidebar, click Create Invoice, select the patient, add the services, and click Send to email the invoice.

faqs.question: How do I search for a patient?
faqs.answer: Use the search bar at the top of the Patients page. You can search by name, email, or phone number.

faqs.question: How do I set my working hours?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Doctor Scheduling. Here you can set your available hours for each day of the week.

faqs.question: How do I block time off?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Blocked Dates. You can add specific dates or time ranges when you're not available.

faqs.question: Can I import patients from another system?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can import patients using a CSV file. Go to Patients and look for the Import option.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: On the login page, click Forgot Password. Enter your email and you'll receive a link to reset your password.

solutions: Check that caps lock is off
Check all required fields are filled
Look for error messages on the form
Search by email or phone number
Check you're viewing the correct date
Check if it's assigned to correct doctor

sidebar_items.name: Dashboard
sidebar_items.description: Overview of activities, tasks, and appointments
